title: thomandersiaceae
intro: The Thomandersiaceae rank is a family classification in the taxonomy of flowering plants. It is a small, monogeneric family of plants, consisting of only one genus, Thomandersia. This family is native to tropical regions of Africa, characterized by its unique and varied species. The Thomandersiaceae family is known for its distinctive flowers and leaves, often with adaptations for survival in its native environments.
